com.google.mu.cel.CelExpr.Ident

Package
Description
com.google.mu.cel
Cel Parser (requires mug-cel artifact)

    Returns the value of the field record component.

    Returns the value of the field record component.

    Returns the value of the function record component.

    Methods in com.google.mu.cel that return types with arguments of type CelExpr.Ident
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr.Ident>>
    CelExpr.Struct.fields()
    Returns the value of the fields record component.
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr.Ident>
    CelExpr.Entry.of(String key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.of("field", value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("field: 1").
    static CelExpr.Entry<CelExpr.Ident>
    CelExpr.Entry.optional(String key, CelExpr value)
    Entry.optional("field", value(1)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("?field: 1").
    Methods in com.google.mu.cel with parameters of type CelExpr.Ident
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CelExpr.MemberCall
    CelExpr.call(CelExpr.Ident member, List<CelExpr> args)
    target.call(member, args) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("target.member(args)").
    default CelExpr.OptionalSelect
    CelExpr.optionalSelect(CelExpr.Ident field)
    expr.optionalSelect("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.?field").
    default CelExpr.Select
    CelExpr.select(CelExpr.Ident field)
    expr.select("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.field").
